title: Update trls-worker skill with commit/push/PR guidance
outcome: Created docs/trls-worker-SKILL.md with per-task commit and story-level push/PR guidance; make skill deploys it correctly

notes.msg: Files: create docs/trls-worker-SKILL.md. Steps: (1) create docs/trls-worker-SKILL.md with updated content — includes worker loop diagram, step-by-step instructions, per-task commit step (feat(ISSUE-ID): ...), story complete push+PR guidance, and common mistakes table; (2) run make skill to deploy; (3) verify with diff <(cat docs/trls-worker-skill-meta.yaml docs/trls-worker-SKILL.md) .claude/skills/trls-worker/SKILL.md (expect no diff); (4) commit: git add docs/trls-worker-skill-meta.yaml docs/trls-worker-SKILL.md && git commit -m 'feat: add trls-worker skill source and commit/PR workflow guidance'. Note: .claude/skills/ should be in .gitignore (build artifact).
Created docs/trls-worker-SKILL.md with commit/push/PR guidance including dot diagram, step-by-step loop, and common mistakes table. make skill succeeded, diff clean, .gitignore confirmed.
